hierarchy.hero_number: text-[12vw] sm:text-[150px] lg:text-[220px] font-light leading-none tracking-tighter text-[#F9F9F9]
hierarchy.hero_label: text-2xl sm:text-4xl font-light tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#888888]
hierarchy.ticker: text-xl sm:text-3xl font-mono font-bold tracking-tight text-[#F9F9F9]

ambient_background.instructions: Place a full-screen fixed container (z-0) with a CSS radial gradient orb in the background (`bg-ember_glow`) that slowly translates and scales. Overlay a repeating noise texture (via CSS mix-blend-mode or pseudo-element) with opacity 0.3 to create a cinematic film grain.

glassmorphism.modal: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050505]/70 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl
glassmorphism.input: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-[#FF6B00] text-[#F9F9F9] transition-colors focus:outline-none py-2

progress_bar.container: h-[2px] bg-white/10 w-full overflow-hidden rounded-full mt-4
progress_bar.fill: h-full bg-[#FF6B00] shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,107,0,0.8)] transition-all duration-1000 ease-out

new_tab_grid.container: min-h-screen w-full relative overflow-hidden p-8 md:p-16 flex flex-col justify-between bg-[#050505]
new_tab_grid.main_content: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-16 items-end z-10 relative flex-grow pb-8

settings_modal.layout: Fixed center, z-50. Max-width sm or md. Glassmorphism panel with generous internal padding (p-8).
settings_modal.fields: Custom start date (optional), Target date (required). Minimalist text/date inputs.
settings_modal.actions: Single prominent 'Save & Begin' button, pill-shaped, bg-[#FF6B00] text-black font-bold px-6 py-3 hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform.

first_run_state.layout: Absolute center of screen. High typographic impact.
first_run_state.content: A simple minimal form asking 'When is your deadline?' with a prominent date input and submit button. Must feel inviting, not like a data entry form.

ticker.layout: Flex row, tabular-nums for equal width spacing.
ticker.content: HH : MM : SS format using Space Mono to prevent jitter as numbers tick.

motion.page_load: Fade in all elements smoothly over 1.5s. Stagger the hero number, then ticker, then progress bar.
motion.orb_drift: CSS keyframes translating X and Y randomly by 10% and scaling from 1 to 1.2 over 30 seconds, looping infinitely.
motion.progress_bar_fill: Animate width from 0% to target % on load using a 2s ease-out transition.
motion.hover_states: Settings icon (lucide-react gear) rotates 45deg and increases opacity to 100% on hover.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG standards against the dark background.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable the drifting orb and make the progress bar fill instant.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for the settings button and modal. Add aria-live='off' to the ticker to prevent screen reader spam.

media.icons: lucide-react for settings gear, minimal stroke width (1.5px)

3d_libraries.recommended: None required. Use native CSS radial-gradient and SVG noise filter for optimal Chrome extension performance.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Manifest V3 Chrome extension. Replace the new tab page. Implement local storage (chrome.storage.local) for persistence. The UI must be incredibly minimal and cinematic. Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards; use raw divs with glassmorphism for the settings modal. Rely on strict typographic hierarchy and asymmetrical layout.
universal_guidelines: No generic centered layouts for the main dashboard—use the asymmetric grid specified.
Never use pure black or pure white—use #050505 for background and #F9F9F9 for text.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans. Strictly use Cormorant Garamond and Space Mono.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='settings-button').
DO NOT use a fully transparent background for the settings modal; use glassmorphism with blur.
No AI-slop gradients. The only gradient is the ambient glowing orb.
Persist settings in chrome.storage.local. On load, show a sleek loading state (just the grain) while fetching data.
